data.description:
## Problem / context
A subagent recently fast-forwarded the SHARED main checkout (/Users/joeoakhart/rebar) to satisfy a `rebar transition <id> in_progress closed`, clobbering uncommitted operator WIP. Root cause: the close's completion precheck reads the CLOSING checkout's git history and needs the merged `rebar-ticket:` commit reachable from HEAD, and our contributor guidance never told authors to fast-forward THEIR OWN WORKTREE (only) after a Gerrit merge. Grounded mechanism: `_referencing_commit_exists` runs `git log` over `repo_root` (src/rebar/_commands/transition_close.py:32-57), called at :153-161 with the "cannot confirm the work landed" error; the completion verifier is invoked with `ref="HEAD"` (:186).

## Scope
DOCUMENTATION ONLY. No `src/rebar` code changes; no new flag/parameter on transition/close. Edit only Markdown docs (AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Plan
1. AGENTS.md — in the "Git workflow — land changes THROUGH GERRIT" section, near the close-discipline bullet, add a bullet: after a change MERGES and BEFORE the ticket close, `git fetch origin && git merge --ff-only origin/main` from inside the worktree; NEVER fast-forward/reset/stash the shared main checkout (it may hold operator WIP) — advance your worktree or a throwaway worktree at origin/main instead.
2. CONTRIBUTING.md — add the same guidance to the landing recipe (a §2f after Submit).

## Acceptance criteria (blocking)
- AC1: AGENTS.md contains the post-merge fast-forward-your-worktree guidance AND the "never touch the shared main checkout" warning.
  Prove: `grep -n 'merge --ff-only origin/main' AGENTS.md` AND `grep -ni 'shared main checkout' AGENTS.md` both return a hit.
- AC2: CONTRIBUTING.md landing recipe carries the same two-part guidance.
  Prove: `grep -n 'merge --ff-only origin/main' CONTRIBUTING.md` AND `grep -ni 'shared main checkout' CONTRIBUTING.md` both return a hit.
- AC3: ZERO code changes — diff touches only *.md.
  Prove: `git diff --name-only origin/main HEAD` lists only Markdown files.
- AC4: pre-commit gate passes. Prove: `make lint` exits 0.
data.title: docs: post-merge close discipline — fast-forward your worktree, never the main checkout
